ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classification_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification result */,
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series being classified */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the classification result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for classification */,
  "classifier" TEXT /* Classifier used for classification */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the time series */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the classification */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the classification */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the classification */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the classification */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_classifier FOREIGN KEY ("classifier") REFERENCES classifiers ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifiers" (
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the classifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classifier */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of classifier */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the classifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series being accessed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the time series */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
